identity.mission: Create a playful, intellectual, and trustworthy educational platform that breaks the 'boring tutor' stereotype.
principles: Fusion: Mix 'Science Lab' aesthetics with 'Playground' energy.
Emotion: Every interaction should feel encouraging and smart.
Clarity: Parents need to trust the process; Students need to be engaged.

primary.name: Intellectual Violet
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Key Headings, Brand Elements

accent.name: Growth Emerald
accent.usage: Success states, Science icons, Price tags

buttons.primary: bg-violet-600 text-white hover:bg-violet-700 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-violet-600 border-2 border-violet-100 hover:border-violet-200 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group

inputs.base: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-violet-500 focus:ring-violet-200 rounded-xl p-4 transition-all

decorations: Use abstract 3D shapes (spheres, cubes) floating in background with low opacity
Use 'squircle' shapes for images instead of standard rectangles
Add subtle noise texture to the background to reduce digital flatness

hero_main.usage: Hero section main visual, masked in a blob shape

abstract_bg.usage: Subtle background element or decorative floater

seo.title: LearnWithVijayshree | Online K-12 Math & Science Tutor USA
seo.description: Expert 1-on-1 online math and science tutoring for K-12 students in USA. Personalized coaching, common core support, and exam prep. Book a free demo class today!

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Add the Google Fonts to index.html or import in CSS.
2. THEME: Update tailwind.config.js to extend the colors with the palette provided above. Do NOT just use default colors.
3. COMPONENTS: Build a 'Section' component that handles the generous padding (py-20) automatically.
4. HERO: Create a split layout. Left: Headline + CTA. Right: The 'hero_main' image masked in a playful organic shape (blob).
5. FORM: The Appointment form is CRITICAL. Make it stand out with a white background, shadow-xl, and the 'Intellectual Violet' border.
6. WHATSAPP: Add a floating WhatsApp button (green) fixed to the bottom right.
7. SEO: Inject the keywords naturally into the H1, H2, and About text. Create a 'Locations' footer section listing the target states.
8. VIDEO: Use a placeholder video component in the Hero or About section with a nice thumbnail.
9. TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).

do_not: Do NOT use standard sharp corners for buttons (use rounded-full or rounded-xl).
Do NOT make the site look like a corporate dashboard. It must feel like a learning adventure.
must_do: Ensure high contrast for accessibility (parents need to read easily).
Make the 'Book Free Demo' button the most prominent element on the page.
